packages.description: Experience the ultimate luxury in Dubai with our signature 5 days / 4 nights package. Enjoy stunning views, desert adventures, and world-class shopping.

itineraries.description: Airport transfer to your 4-star hotel in Downtown Dubai for check-in and relaxation.
itineraries.title: Arrival & Check-in

itineraries.description: Explore the Dubai Mall and experience the Burj Khalifa At-The-Top ticket. Watch the magnificent Fountain Show in the evening.
itineraries.title: Dubai City Tour & Burj Khalifa

itineraries.description: Afternoon thrills with a Desert Safari experience, complete with dune bashing, camel riding, and a BBQ dinner under the stars.
itineraries.title: Desert Safari

itineraries.description: Relax on a luxurious Dubai Marina Yacht Cruise with stunning views of the city skyline. Later, enjoy an Abu Dhabi Grand Mosque tour.
itineraries.title: Marina Yacht Cruise

itineraries.description: Enjoy breakfast before transferring to the airport for your flight home.
itineraries.title: Departure

packages.meta_description: 5 Days 4 Nights luxury escape to Dubai including Desert Safari, Yacht Cruise, and Burj Khalifa.
packages.title: Dubai Luxury Escape

packages.description: Discover the City of Light with our enchanting 6 days / 5 nights package. Enjoy the Eiffel Tower, world-class cuisine, and the finest art museums in the world.

itineraries.description: Arrive at Charles de Gaulle Airport and transfer to your 4-star boutique hotel in central Paris. Evening welcome dinner.
itineraries.title: Arrival & Welcome

itineraries.description: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower with summit access, then stroll down the Champs-Élysées and Arc de Triomphe.
itineraries.title: Eiffel Tower & Champs-Élysées

itineraries.description: Explore the world's largest art museum, the Louvre, then wander the artistic hilltop village of Montmartre.
itineraries.title: Louvre & Montmartre

itineraries.description: Day trip to the opulent Palace of Versailles and its magnificent gardens, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
itineraries.title: Palace of Versailles

itineraries.description: Morning Seine River Cruise with views of Notre-Dame, followed by free time for shopping in Le Marais.
itineraries.title: Seine River Cruise & Shopping

itineraries.description: Enjoy a final Parisian breakfast before transferring to the airport for your flight home.
itineraries.title: Departure

packages.meta_description: 6 Days 5 Nights romantic escape to Paris including Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Seine River Cruise.
packages.title: Paris Romance Getaway
